title: oncoba kivuensis
intro: Oncoba kivuensis is a plant species belonging to the family Salicaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oncoba kivuensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, often made into a decoction or infusion, to treat various ailments.
